acceptance_criteria.verification_method: Read hooks/pretool-bash-safety.sh lines 895-941; extracted and executed normalize_ansic_token() logic against all four AC2 test vectors in Python; verified combined $-strip+decode pipeline
evidence: normalize_ansic_token() function present at line 895 of pretool-bash-safety.sh
Function called at line 935 as: decoded = normalize_ansic_token(stripped) where stripped = t.replace('$', '')
Test vector hex \x2dfprint: decoded to '-fprint', matched WRITE_ACTION_FLAGS -> DENY
Test vector octal \055fprint: decoded to '-fprint', matched WRITE_ACTION_FLAGS -> DENY
Test vector bare octal \55fprint: decoded to '-fprint', matched WRITE_ACTION_FLAGS -> DENY
Test vector unicode \u002dfprint: decoded to '-fprint', matched WRITE_ACTION_FLAGS -> DENY
Combined pipeline: t.replace('$','') then normalize_ansic_token() handles concatenated escape fragments
Fail-closed: except Exception: return None at line 919-920; caller treats None as DENY (lines 936-938)
Existing $-strip defense at lines 927-931 preserved as secondary layer
acceptance_criteria.details: normalize_ansic_token() handles \xHH (hex), \0NNN (leading-zero octal), \NNN (bare octal), \uHHHH (unicode), \UHHHHHHHH, and standard C escapes. All four spec test vectors decode to '-fprint' which matches WRITE_ACTION_FLAGS. The combined $-strip+decode pipeline catches concatenated forms. Fail-closed returns None on exception.

evidence: Line 335: '**When BULK=false**: orphan files MUST NOT be committed.'

Phase 7 section clearly separates BULK=false (warn+skip) from BULK=true (existing bulk workflow) behavior
acceptance_criteria.details: Phase 7 now has explicit BULK=false guard: orphans MUST NOT be committed; print warning and skip. BULK=true defers to bulk workflow's existing orphan skip. No unconditional orphan commit path remains.

qa.overall_verdict: All 4 acceptance criteria pass. (1) changelog-analyst.md lines 124-127 now contain ABORT with failure_code: scope_violation and the 'falling back to stage-all' escape hatch is absent. (2) normalize_ansic_token() function is present in pretool-bash-safety.sh and correctly decodes all spec test vectors (hex \x2d, octal \055, bare octal \55, unicode \u002d) to '-fprint' which triggers DENY; combined $-strip+decode pipeline handles concatenated forms; fail-closed returns None on exception. (3) Old token 'bulk-commit-auth-flag-write' is absent from all 16 test source files; new token 'bulk-commit-sentinel-write' is present in all 16 expected files. (4) Phase 7 orphan handling now explicitly warns+skips orphans when BULK=false with no unconditional commit path.

root_cause_verification.rationale: All three root causes are addressed: (A) stage-all fallback and unconditional orphan commit removed from changelog-analyst.md — replaced with ABORT and warn+skip respectively. (B) normalize_ansic_token() added to Layer 1.F Python helper — verified to decode all bypass vectors before WRITE_ACTION_FLAGS matching. (C) Token replacement verified via grep across all 16 affected test files.

build_verification.skip_reason: Non-UI changes: hook/agent-prompt edits and test file token replacements. No compiled artifacts or deployable services affected. BA spec explicitly marks setup/applicability as N/A for non-UI cycle.
